prompt_used: This is Villain. Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies. Work the case in order: secure telemetry checksum drift, confirm the scene at mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array, and do not let The Quiet Orbit choose the pace. Trust the evidence before you trust the performance.
source_prompt: Story: Signal From Kharon-9 (signal-from-kharon-9) | Hook: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies. | Subgenre: cosmic horror | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array | Villain: The Quiet Orbit | Villain worldview: Human choices are measurable noise in a larger equation. | Motifs: black stars, phase drift, echoing pings. Create villain voice profile for The Quiet Orbit. Worldview: Human choices are measurable noise in a larger equation.. Manner: Clinical amusement at human certainty..
